input:
The ceiling was made of stalks of the branches of palm date trees which did not prevent rain leaking through. No special flooring or carpeting was used. A few mats were laid down which did not cover the whole area. Many worshippers prayed on the bare sandy floor. Next to the mosque two rooms were built for the Prophet to use as a home. Similar material was used to build them and the roofing was also of palm date branches.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 15: Madinah

output.scene_title: The Prophet's New Home in Madinah
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 15: Madinah

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Late 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a brown cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by brown cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Unidentified Sahabi
characters.appearance: 40s-50s, light olive skin, slender build, slightly shorter than average. Thin beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, slightly stooped shoulders.

output.moral_lesson: Humility is key to a peaceful and harmonious community.
output.narrative_text: In Madinah, the Prophet and his companions built a new home for the Prophet next to the mosque. The mosque had a simple ceiling made of palm date tree branches, and worshippers prayed on the bare sandy floor. The Prophet's new home was built with similar materials.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by doorway light. Simple scene with warm desert colors, suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Watercolor illustration of a simple 7th century Madinah mud-brick home. A man in white thobe and brown cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing near an open doorway with warm golden sunlight streaming behind him. Inside, an older Arab man with light olive skin, thin beard with henna tint, off-white thobe and woolen cloak, sitting on a woven mat looking relaxed, one hand on his chest. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
